agent.label: Civic Memory

public_shocks.summary: An early freeze tests the first winter stores.
A waterborne fever moves through the basin.
The river crosses its old banks and reaches the granaries.
Three weak snowmelt seasons tighten the watershed.
A dry lightning front burns the western buffer.
A civic archive is lost during a transfer of power.
A late epidemic tests institutional memory.
